mnemonics.title: Security Design Principles
mnemonics.content: LEAST PRIVILEGE, SEPARATION OF DUTIES, DEFENSE IN DEPTH, FAIL-SAFE, ECONOMY OF MECHANISM, COMPLETE MEDIATION, OPEN DESIGN, PSYCHOLOGICAL ACCEPTABILITY, LEAST COMMON MECHANISM

acronyms.expansion: Least Privilege, Economy of mechanism, Authentication, Separation of duties, Tamper-evidence
acronyms.usage: To remember the key security design principles

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a fortress with multiple layers of defense, each representing a different security design principle

analogies.analogy: Building a secure house, where each room represents a different security design principle
